title: viola tricolor subsp. nana
intro: Viola tricolor subsp. nana, also known as Dwarf Pansy or Small-flowered Pansy, is a subspecies of the heartsease plant, a small, delicate perennial herb belonging to the violet family. The medicinal properties of Viola tricolor subsp. nana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep due to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of Viola tricolor subsp. nana include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
